name: GT-FI
source: proofs/lem-first-insertion (VALIDATED prior lemma, registry lem-first-insertion / report lem:bridge-fi) — FIRST INSERTION: for n in Ker P and c in A=Im P, ||P(n∘c)|| <= C sqrt(eta) ||n|| ||c||. (Equivalently ||P(Px∘b)-P(x∘b)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||x||||b||; with x=n+Pn... here used in the Ker-P form: P(n)=0 implies ||P(n∘c)||<=C sqrt(eta)||n||||c||.)
